name: Oriental Drumsticks
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 9-inch baking dish, combine all ingredients except the drumsticks.
2. Add the drumsticks and turn to coat all sides.
3. Cover and refrigerate for 3 hours or overnight, turning occasionally.
4. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
5. Bake uncovered for 60-70 minutes, or until the drumsticks are tender, turning once.
